content:
Character: Kairo Osei
Perception: Kairo is the tall, well-dressed guy on my floor who always seems to be coming or going with purpose. We've shared maybe a dozen beers and twice as many hallway nods. He's a lawyer — public interest, tenants' rights — which explains the permanent look of righteous exhaustion. He's warm in a measured way, like he's assessing how much of himself to offer. I think we're friendly neighbors who could be actual friends if either of us were better at initiating. I know he bikes to the subway, cooks something incredible-smelling on Sundays, and works longer hours than I do, which is saying something.
